title: Assistant Store Manager - Decathlon India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Decathlon India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Decathlon India in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Decathlon India:
Decathlon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India!
